<!-- ══ 06 AMR THREAT METER ══ -->
<div id="threat" class="reveal">
  <div class="threat-inner">
    <div class="section-label">06 · The Scale of the Crisis</div>
    <h2 class="section-title">AMR Threat<br><em>Rising Every Decade</em></h2>
    <div class="threat-layout">
      <div class="gauge-wrap">
        <div class="gauge-svg-wrap">
          <svg viewBox="0 0 280 160" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" style="width:100%;height:100%">
            <defs>
              <linearGradient id="gaugeGrad" x1="0" y1="0" x2="1" y2="0">
                <stop offset="0%" stop-color="#4ab068"/>
                <stop offset="40%" stop-color="#c47a0a"/>
                <stop offset="100%" stop-color="#c94a1e"/>
              </linearGradient>
            </defs>
            <path d="M30,140 A110,110 0 0,1 250,140" fill="none" stroke="rgba(13,40,24,0.1)" stroke-width="18" stroke-linecap="round"/>
            <path id="gaugeArc" d="M30,140 A110,110 0 0,1 250,140" fill="none" stroke="url(#gaugeGrad)" stroke-width="18" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-dasharray="0 346" style="transition:stroke-dasharray 2s cubic-bezier(0.22,1,0.36,1)"/>
            <line id="gaugeNeedle" x1="140" y1="140" x2="140" y2="42" stroke="var(--warning)" stroke-width="2.5" stroke-linecap="round" transform="rotate(-90 140 140)" style="transition:transform 2s cubic-bezier(0.22,1,0.36,1)"/>
            <circle cx="140" cy="140" r="6" fill="var(--warning)"/>
            <text x="20" y="158" fill="var(--text3)" font-family="Space Mono,monospace" font-size="8">LOW</text>
            <text x="122" y="28" fill="var(--text3)" font-family="Space Mono,monospace" font-size="8">MID</text>
            <text x="240" y="158" fill="var(--warning)" font-family="Space Mono,monospace" font-size="8">CRIT</text>
            <text x="140" y="115" text-anchor="middle" fill="var(--soil)" font-family="Playfair Display,serif" font-size="22" font-weight="900" id="gaugeVal">—</text>
            <text x="140" y="130" text-anchor="middle" fill="var(--text3)" font-family="Space Mono,monospace" font-size="7" letter-spacing="1">DEATHS / YEAR</text>
          </svg>
        </div>
        <div class="gauge-label">Drag the slider to see AMR projections over time</div>
        <input type="range" id="yearSlider" min="0" max="3" value="1" step="1" style="width:220px;margin-top:0.5rem;accent-color:var(--accent);cursor:pointer">
        <div id="yearLabel" style="font-family:'Space Mono',monospace;font-size:0.6rem;color:var(--amber);letter-spacing:0.15em;margin-top:0.3rem">Year: 2022</div>
      </div>
      <div>
        <div class="threat-timeline">
          <div style="font-family:'Space Mono',monospace;font-size:0.52rem;letter-spacing:0.2em;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--text3);margin-bottom:1rem">AMR Deaths — Historical to Projected</div>
          <div class="tt-row"><div class="tt-year">2019</div><div class="tt-track"><div class="tt-fill" data-w="13" style="background:var(--accent)"></div></div></div>
          <div class="tt-row"><div class="tt-year">2022</div><div class="tt-track"><div class="tt-fill" data-w="26" style="background:var(--light)"></div></div></div>
          <div class="tt-row"><div class="tt-year">2030</div><div class="tt-track"><div class="tt-fill" data-w="50" style="background:var(--amber)"></div></div></div>
          <div class="tt-row"><div class="tt-year">2050</div><div class="tt-track"><div class="tt-fill" data-w="100" style="background:linear-gradient(90deg,var(--amber),var(--warning))"></div></div></div>
          <div style="display:flex;justify-content:space-between;margin-top:0.5rem">
            <span style="font-family:'Space Mono',monospace;font-size:0.5rem;color:var(--muted)">0</span>
            <span style="font-family:'Space Mono',monospace;font-size:0.5rem;color:var(--warning)">10 million / year →</span>
          </div>
          <div style="margin-top:2rem;padding:1.2rem;background:rgba(201,74,30,0.05);border:1px solid rgba(201,74,30,0.2);border-radius:4px">
            <div style="font-family:'Space Mono',monospace;font-size:0.52rem;letter-spacing:0.12em;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--warning);margin-bottom:0.5rem">If left unchecked by 2050</div>
            <div style="font-size:0.82rem;color:var(--text2);line-height:1.65">AMR will kill more people annually than cancer, cost $100 trillion globally, and push 28 million into poverty — making routine surgery, chemotherapy, and common infection treatment life-threatening.</div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<div class="full-divider"></div>

<!-- ══ 07 AMR CYCLE ══ -->
<div id="cycle" class="reveal">
  <div class="cycle-layout">
    <div>
      <div class="section-label">07 · The Escalation Cycle</div>
      <h2 class="section-title">From Farm<br><em>To Human Infection</em></h2>
      <p class="cycle-intro">Tap each stage to explore how AMR escalates — a self-reinforcing loop with no natural endpoint unless systemic action is taken.</p>
      <div id="ci-farm" class="ci-node" onclick="showCycle('farm')"><div class="ci-dot" style="background:var(--accent);border-color:var(--light)"></div><div><div class="ci-step">Stage 01</div><div class="ci-label">Farm Antibiotic Use</div></div><div class="ci-arrow">→</div></div>
      <div id="ci-river" class="ci-node" onclick="showCycle('river')"><div class="ci-dot" style="background:var(--amber);border-color:var(--amber)"></div><div><div class="ci-step">Stage 02</div><div class="ci-label">River Contamination</div></div><div class="ci-arrow">→</div></div>
      <div id="ci-bacteria" class="ci-node" onclick="showCycle('bacteria')"><div class="ci-dot" style="background:var(--warning);border-color:var(--warning)"></div><div><div class="ci-step">Stage 03</div><div class="ci-label">Resistant Bacteria Form</div></div><div class="ci-arrow">→</div></div>
      <div id="ci-human" class="ci-node" onclick="showCycle('human')"><div class="ci-dot" style="background:#8b5e3c;border-color:#a07050"></div><div><div class="ci-step">Stage 04</div><div class="ci-label">Human Infection</div></div><div class="ci-arrow">→</div></div>
      <div id="ci-fail" class="ci-node" onclick="showCycle('fail')"><div class="ci-dot" style="background:#8b2020;border-color:var(--warning)"></div><div><div class="ci-step">Stage 05</div><div class="ci-label">Treatment Failure</div></div><div class="ci-arrow">↺</div></div>
      <div class="cycle-panel" id="cyclePanel">
        <div class="cdp-default" id="cdp-default">👆 Tap a stage above to explore its role in the AMR cycle</div>
        <div class="cdp-content" id="cdp-farm"><div class="cdp-title">Farm Antibiotic Use</div><div class="cdp-body">Farmers administer antibiotics to poultry, pig, and fish feed to accelerate growth and prevent disease in crowded conditions. Between <strong>50–70%</strong> of each dose is excreted unchanged in animal waste, still biologically active. Spread as fertilizer on rice paddies, rainfall carries these active antibiotics into streams draining into the Citarum.</div><span class="cdp-stat">73% of all antibiotics consumed by agriculture · Van Boeckel, 2019</span></div>
        <div class="cdp-content" id="cdp-river"><div class="cdp-title">River Contamination</div><div class="cdp-body">Antibiotic-laden runoff drains into waterways. Ciprofloxacin has been found at up to <strong>50 µg/L</strong> in South Asian rivers, roughly 500 times above the safe resistance-selection threshold. Tetracycline in West Java livestock wastewater reached 140–380 µg/L.</div><span class="cdp-stat">500× above safe threshold · Larsson & Flach, 2022</span></div>
        <div class="cdp-content" id="cdp-bacteria"><div class="cdp-title">Resistant Bacteria Form</div><div class="cdp-body">Bacteria exposed to sub-lethal concentrations don't die — they adapt. Through gene mutations and horizontal gene transfer (HGT), they acquire resistance. In Citarum sediments: <strong>blaCTX-M</strong>, <strong>mcr-1</strong>, and tetracycline resistance genes have all been detected at up to 10⁸ gene copies per gram.</div><span class="cdp-stat">mcr-1 gene detected · Bengtsson-Palme et al., 2018</span></div>
        <div class="cdp-content" id="cdp-human"><div class="cdp-title">Human Infection</div><div class="cdp-body">Resistance genes travel in water droplets, on food surfaces, and through children's hands into households. Genetic pollution is unlike plastic: it is <strong>irreversible on human timescales</strong>. Resistance genes persist in sediment for decades or centuries.</div><span class="cdp-stat">28 million people at risk in the Citarum watershed</span></div>
        <div class="cdp-content" id="cdp-fail"><div class="cdp-title">Treatment Failure — The Loop Closes</div><div class="cdp-body">When resistant bacteria cause infection, standard antibiotics fail. Doctors resort to stronger last-resort drugs, which are more environmentally persistent — further selecting for resistance in an escalating loop until <strong>no therapeutic options remain</strong>.</div><span class="cdp-stat">Prevention is categorically superior to remediation</span></div>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="cycle-diag">
      <div class="cycle-ring ring-1"></div>
      <div class="cycle-ring ring-2"></div>
      <div class="ring-center"><div class="c-label">AMR<br>Crisis</div></div>
      <div class="cnode cn1"><div class="nd"></div>Farm<br>Antibiotic Use</div>
      <div class="cnode cn2"><div class="nd" style="background:var(--amber);border-color:var(--amber)"></div>River<br>Contamination</div>
      <div class="cnode cn3"><div class="nd" style="background:var(--warning);border-color:var(--warning)"></div>Human<br>Infection</div>
      <div class="cnode cn4"><div class="nd" style="background:#8b5e3c;border-color:#a07050"></div>Treatment<br>Failure</div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<div class="full-divider"></div>

<!-- ══ 08 SOLUTIONS ══ -->
<div id="solutions" class="reveal">
  <div class="solutions-inner">
    <div class="section-label">08 · Evidence-Based Solutions</div>
    <h2 class="section-title">Six Coordinated<br><em>Interventions</em></h2>

    <!-- Photo banner for solutions -->
    <div class="photo-strip-wrap" style="margin-bottom:2rem;border-radius:4px;overflow:hidden;box-shadow:0 4px 20px rgba(13,40,24,0.08)">
      <img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="Citarum cleanup progress" class="photo-strip" style="height:200px;object-fit:cover;object-position:center 60%">
      <div class="photo-caption" style="background:linear-gradient(to top,rgba(13,40,24,0.85) 0%,transparent 100%)">📍 Cleanup in progress — community-led remediation along the Citarum shows what coordinated action can achieve</div>
    </div>

    <div class="solutions-grid">
      <div class="sol-card"><div class="sol-num">01</div><div class="sol-title">Enforce Antibiotic Growth Promoter Ban</div><div class="sol-desc">Enforce Permentan No. 14/2017 through regular inspections, meaningful penalties, and transition subsidies for smallholders.</div><div class="sol-badge">Policy</div></div>
      <div class="sol-card"><div class="sol-num">02</div><div class="sol-title">Mandate 60-Day Manure Composting</div><div class="sol-desc">Composting for a minimum of 60 days before field application destroys 90–99% of resistant bacteria. Delivered through subsidised community facilities. (Manyi-Loh et al., 2018)</div><div class="sol-badge">Agricultural Practice</div></div>
      <div class="sol-card"><div class="sol-num">03</div><div class="sol-title">Biochar Filters from Rice Husks</div><div class="sol-desc">A 2022 study confirmed 94% removal of Pseudomonas aeruginosa and 88% removal of clarithromycin at ~$0.05/litre cost. (Xiang et al., 2022)</div><div class="sol-badge">Technology</div></div>
      <div class="sol-card"><div class="sol-num">04</div><div class="sol-title">Farmer Training Programs</div><div class="sol-desc">Training in hygiene, vaccination, and composting reduced antibiotic use by 40% in Thai poultry farms within two years, directly replicable in Indonesia. (FAO, 2019)</div><div class="sol-badge">Education</div></div>
      <div class="sol-card"><div class="sol-num">05</div><div class="sol-title">Advanced Wastewater Treatment</div><div class="sol-desc">Ozonation (99% bacterial removal), activated carbon filtration (90–95% antibiotic removal), and membrane bioreactors (99.9% removal) mandatory for all Citarum-basin factories. (Sundin et al., 2021)</div><div class="sol-badge">Infrastructure</div></div>
      <div class="sol-card"><div class="sol-num">06</div><div class="sol-title">Bacteriophage Therapy & Probiotics</div><div class="sol-desc">Phage therapy and probiotic supplementation reduced Salmonella infections in poultry by 70%, replacing antibiotics without generating resistance. (Callaway et al., 2018)</div><div class="sol-badge">Biotechnology</div></div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<div class="full-divider"></div>

<!-- ══ 09 ONE HEALTH ══ -->
<div id="onehealth" class="reveal">
  <div class="oh-layout">
    <div>
      <div class="section-label">09 · Framework</div>
      <h2 class="section-title">The <em>One Health</em><br>Principle</h2>
      <div class="oh-text">
        <p>The WHO, FAO, and the World Organisation for Animal Health (OIE) all endorse the One Health framework: the recognition that human health, animal health, and environmental health form a single, inseparable system.</p>
        <p>Because AMR originates at the intersection of all three domains, no single-sector intervention is sufficient. The six solutions above are designed to address agricultural practice, environmental contamination, and human health simultaneously.</p>
        <p>Protecting one domain requires protecting all three. This is not a medical problem alone. It is not an agricultural problem alone. It is a civilizational challenge that demands all three systems act together.</p>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="oh-venn">
      <div class="venn-circle vc-human">Human<br>Health</div>
      <div class="venn-circle vc-animal">Animal<br>Health</div>
      <div class="venn-circle vc-env">Environmental<br>Health</div>
      <div class="venn-center">One Health</div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<div class="full-divider"></div>

<!-- ══ 10 YOUTH CTA ══ -->
<div id="youth" class="reveal">
  <div class="youth-inner">
    <div class="section-label" style="justify-content:center">10 · Call to Action</div>
    <h2>The Next Generation Must<br><em>Act Before the Window Closes</em></h2>
    <p>The knowledge exists. The solutions are proven. Indonesian students — living within the Citarum watershed — are not bystanders to this crisis. They are its most credible advocates, most adaptable innovators, and essential bridge-builders between evidence and action.</p>
    <div class="role-cards">
      <div class="role-card"><div class="rc-icon">📣</div><div class="rc-title">As Advocates</div><div class="rc-desc">Demand enforcement of Permentan No. 14/2017, organise evidence-based public campaigns, and hold governments and corporations accountable.</div></div>
      <div class="role-card"><div class="rc-icon">🔬</div><div class="rc-title">As Innovators</div><div class="rc-desc">Develop locally adapted solutions — low-cost biochar filter designs for smallholder farms and mobile systems for monitoring antibiotic residues in local waterways.</div></div>
      <div class="role-card"><div class="rc-icon">🌉</div><div class="rc-title">As Bridge-Builders</div><div class="rc-desc">Close the gap between scientific evidence and policy action by translating complex AMR data into accessible narratives. The communication gap is a leadership gap.</div></div>
    </div>
    <div class="action-pills">
      <div class="pill">Never buy antibiotics without prescription</div>
      <div class="pill">Complete every prescribed course</div>
      <div class="pill">Choose antibiotic-free meat & eggs</div>
      <div class="pill">Support local sustainable farmers</div>
      <div class="pill">Spread AMR awareness</div>
      <div class="pill">Demand policy enforcement</div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<div class="full-divider"></div>

<!-- ══ 11 ABOUT ══ -->
<div id="about" class="reveal">
  <div class="about-inner">
    <div class="section-label">11 · The Team</div>
    <h2 class="section-title">About <em>Us</em></h2>
    <div class="about-grid">
      <div class="member-card"><div class="member-avatar">A</div><div class="member-name">Muhammad Azzhafran Nur</div><div class="member-divider"></div><div class="member-email">muhammadazzhafran55@gmail.com</div></div>
      <div class="member-card"><div class="member-avatar">A</div><div class="member-name">Alisyar Azis Muhara</div><div class="member-divider"></div><div class="member-email">alisyarmuhara@gmail.com</div></div>
      <div class="member-card"><div class="member-avatar">A</div><div class="member-name">Muhammad 'Adl Asshodiq</div><div class="member-divider"></div><div class="member-email">m.a.asshodiqihbs@gmail.com</div></div>
      <div class="member-card"><div class="member-avatar">H</div><div class="member-name">Muhammad Hafiz Alfatih</div><div class="member-divider"></div><div class="member-email">me.not.hafiz@gmail.com</div></div>
      <div class="member-card"><div class="member-avatar">R</div><div class="member-name">Raffa Ahmad Al-Aula</div><div class="member-divider"></div><div class="member-email">raahmadfa@gmail.com</div></div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<footer>
  <div class="footer-school"><strong>SMA Ibnu Hajar Boarding School</strong>Depok, West Java, Indonesia · 2026<br>International Future Leaders Conference</div>
  <div class="footer-badge">Reclaiming The Earth We Farm</div>
</footer>

<script>
// PROGRESS
window.addEventListener('scroll',()=>{
  const s=window.scrollY,h=document.body.scrollHeight-window.innerHeight;
  document.getElementById('progress').style.width=(s/h*100)+'%';
  updateActiveNav();
});

// PARTICLE CANVAS
(function(){
  const c=document.getElementById('pcvs');
  const ctx=c.getContext('2d');
  let W,H,pts=[];
  function resize(){W=c.width=window.innerWidth;H=c.height=c.parentElement.offsetHeight||window.innerHeight}
  window.addEventListener('resize',resize);resize();
  for(let i=0;i<48;i++)pts.push({x:Math.random()*W,y:Math.random()*H,vx:(Math.random()-.5)*.22,vy:(Math.random()-.5)*.22,r:Math.random()*2+1.2});
  function draw(){
    ctx.clearRect(0,0,W,H);
    pts.forEach((p,i)=>{
      p.x+=p.vx;p.y+=p.vy;
      if(p.x<0||p.x>W)p.vx*=-1;if(p.y<0||p.y>H)p.vy*=-1;
      ctx.beginPath();ctx.arc(p.x,p.y,p.r,0,Math.PI*2);
      ctx.fillStyle='rgba(26,122,69,0.5)';ctx.fill();
      pts.slice(i+1).forEach(q=>{
        const dx=p.x-q.x,dy=p.y-q.y,d=Math.sqrt(dx*dx+dy*dy);
        if(d<115){ctx.beginPath();ctx.moveTo(p.x,p.y);ctx.lineTo(q.x,q.y);ctx.strokeStyle='rgba(26,122,69,'+(0.15*(1-d/115))+')';ctx.lineWidth=0.6;ctx.stroke()}
      });
    });
    requestAnimationFrame(draw);
  }
  draw();
})();

// SCROLL REVEAL
const reveals=document.querySelectorAll('.reveal');
const ro=new IntersectionObserver(entries=>{entries.forEach(e=>{if(e.isIntersecting){e.target.classList.add('visible');ro.unobserve(e.target)}})},{threshold:0.08});
reveals.forEach(r=>ro.observe(r));

// ANIMATED BARS
const bObs=new IntersectionObserver(entries=>{
  entries.forEach(e=>{if(e.isIntersecting){e.target.querySelectorAll('.ab-fill,.tt-fill').forEach(f=>f.style.width=(f.dataset.w||0)+'%');bObs.unobserve(e.target)}});
},{threshold:0.25});
['abChart','threat'].forEach(id=>{const el=document.getElementById(id);if(el)bObs.observe(el)});

// STAGGER
document.querySelectorAll('.fact-card').forEach((c,i)=>c.style.transitionDelay=(i*0.1)+'s');
document.querySelectorAll('.member-card').forEach((c,i)=>c.style.transitionDelay=(i*0.08)+'s');

// WHAT'S IN THE WATER
let activeContam=null;
function showContam(id){
  document.querySelectorAll('.witw-content').forEach(c=>c.classList.remove('active'));
  document.querySelectorAll('.contam-bubble').forEach(b=>b.style.boxShadow='none');
  const def=document.getElementById('witw-default');
  if(activeContam===id){activeContam=null;def.style.display='flex';return}
  activeContam=id;
  def.style.display='none';
  const content=document.getElementById('wc-'+id);
  const bubble=document.getElementById('cb-'+id);
  if(content)content.classList.add('active');
  if(bubble)bubble.style.boxShadow='0 0 20px rgba(201,74,30,0.4)';
}

// AMR GAUGE
const gaugeData=[
  {year:'2019',deaths:'1.27M',val:280,angle:-80},
  {year:'2022',deaths:'4.95M',val:195,angle:-35},
  {year:'2030',deaths:'~7M',val:260,angle:20},
  {year:'2050',deaths:'10M',val:346,angle:80},
];
const slider=document.getElementById('yearSlider');
const gaugeArc=document.getElementById('gaugeArc');
const gaugeNeedle=document.getElementById('gaugeNeedle');
const gaugeVal=document.getElementById('gaugeVal');
const yearLabel=document.getElementById('yearLabel');
function updateGauge(i){
  const d=gaugeData[i];
  gaugeArc.setAttribute('stroke-dasharray',d.val+' 346');
  gaugeNeedle.setAttribute('transform','rotate('+d.angle+' 140 140)');
  gaugeVal.textContent=d.deaths;
  yearLabel.textContent='Year: '+d.year;
}
slider.addEventListener('input',()=>updateGauge(+slider.value));
const gaugeObs=new IntersectionObserver(entries=>{
  entries.forEach(e=>{if(e.isIntersecting){updateGauge(+slider.value);gaugeObs.unobserve(e.target)}});
},{threshold:0.3});
const threatEl=document.getElementById('threat');
if(threatEl)gaugeObs.observe(threatEl);

// INTERACTIVE CYCLE
let activeCycle=null;
function showCycle(id){
  document.querySelectorAll('.ci-node').forEach(n=>n.classList.remove('active'));
  document.querySelectorAll('.cdp-content').forEach(c=>c.classList.remove('active'));
  const def=document.getElementById('cdp-default');
  const panel=document.getElementById('cyclePanel');
  if(activeCycle===id){activeCycle=null;def.style.display='flex';return}
  activeCycle=id;
  document.getElementById('ci-'+id).classList.add('active');
  const content=document.getElementById('cdp-'+id);
  if(content){def.style.display='none';content.classList.add('active')}
}

// MENU
let menuOpen=true;
function toggleMenu(){menuOpen=!menuOpen;document.getElementById('sidenav').classList.toggle('hidden',!menuOpen);document.getElementById('menu-toggle').classList.toggle('open',menuOpen)}
document.getElementById('menu-toggle').classList.add('open');
function navClick(e,id){
  e.preventDefault();
  const t=document.getElementById(id);if(!t)return;
  window.scrollTo({top:t.getBoundingClientRect().top+window.scrollY-80,behavior:'smooth'});
  if(window.innerWidth<=899){menuOpen=false;document.getElementById('sidenav').classList.add('hidden');document.getElementById('menu-toggle').classList.remove('open')}
}

// ACTIVE NAV
const secIds=['background','intro','river-compare','inthewater','sources','story','threat','cycle','solutions','onehealth','youth','about'];
function updateActiveNav(){
  const mid=window.scrollY+window.innerHeight*0.4;let cur=null;
  for(const id of secIds){const el=document.getElementById(id);if(el&&el.offsetTop<=mid)cur=id}
  document.querySelectorAll('.snav-item').forEach(item=>item.classList.toggle('active',item.getAttribute('href').replace('#','')===cur));
}
updateActiveNav();
</script>
</body>
</html>
